catalog_content:
Item Name: Busty Lush SHE'S GOLDEN Non-Alcoholic Blonde Beer, Low Calorie, Craft Brewed NA Malte Beer, 12 Pack
Bullet Point 1: She's Golden: A blonde-style ale with delicious hints of tropical fruits and a moderate bitter note that leaves a clean and dry finish. We hope you agree it's as near beer as it gets!
Bullet Point 2: Non-Alcoholic Beer: Our blonde-style NA beer is big on flavor but low in calories and without the addition of unnecessary sugar and harmful additives. Only 67 calories per can for guilt free enjoyment!
Bullet Point 3: Ingredients: Water, Malted Barley, Citra Hops, and Yeast
Bullet Point 4: Size: Each order comes with 12 cans of our She's Golden non-alcoholic blonde-style beer. Try our other flavors, or if you can't decide - check out our variety pack!
Bullet Point 5: About Busty Lush: As the wife of a brewer and mother of two, Laurel became inspired to create a line of craft non-alcoholic beverages celebrating women. She believed there was a place in the craft beer market for a masterful and flavorful non-alcoholic beer and mocktail brand that reflected a vibrant, female-forward design concept. Busty Lush is a celebration of beautiful and unapologetic women, but we hope men enjoy these fabulous malt beverages just as much!
Product Description: Introducing Busty Lush SHE'S GOLDEN Non-Alcoholic Blonde Beer, Craft Brewed NA Malt Beverage. Embrace the golden hues and vibrant flavors of our blonde-style ale, featuring tantalizing hints of tropical fruits and a balanced moderate bitterness for a clean, dry finish. Crafted without unnecessary sugar or additives, each can is a guilt-free indulgence in refreshing flavor. Each order includes 12 cans of our She's Golden brew, made with water, malted barley, Citra hops, and yeast. Join Laurel's vision to celebrate women in craft brewing with Busty Lush, where bold flavor meets vibrant, female-forward design. Explore our other flavors or indulge in our variety pack – because every taste is a celebration of beautiful and unapologetic women.
Value: 12.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: A female-forward, craft non-alcoholic beer brand targeting a niche market with a playful, empowering design. Positioned as a low-calorie, additive-free alternative with a premium flavor profile, though lacking organic, gluten-free, or other specialized certifications. The 12-pack bundle deal provides volume discount appeal, while the tropical fruit notes and clean finish justify a mid-range pricing strategy compared to traditional alcoholic beers. Brand storytelling and female-centric marketing may enhance perceived value for its core demographic.
